title: Bombardino Crocodillo Mod
description: Adds Bombardino Crocodillo and some other random stuff
body:
# **WELCOME**

**This is my first mod, so there might be some bugs. Have fun while playing this mod!**

## **Click this if you want to get spoiler**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
## Mobs

**Bombardino Crocodillo**

Idc if I spelled it wrong. They are fying alligator that likes to bomb stuff. They will ignore you as long as you don't attack them. There's a change where they will drop bombs when you attack it. You can summon it by making a structure (images in gallery).

**Chat GPT**

Idk if this counts, but when a villager who don't have a job finds a Server, it will become Chat GPT. You can trade some unusual items with them.

## Items/Weapons/Food
**RPG**

Shoots rockets that explodes and deals high damage!

**Weed Seeds**

You can obtain these ancient seeds by waiting for a sniffer to dig up it for you. You can plant this for more seeds or make it into

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
**Yellow Powder**

 That's right, the yellow powder (not the white powder). You can consume it to get speed, jump boost, and haste for 5 seconds.

</details>

**Crocodillo Tooth**

Obtain by defeating the Bombardino Crocodillo. It has high attack speed and damage. Can be craft into the next item.

**Crocodillo Circlet**
Wearing this circlet will give you strength.

**Raw and Cooked Crocodillo Meat**

Obtain raw by defeating the Bombardino Crocodillo. Takes longer time to eat than other food and lesser nutricious. Can be cooked into Cooked Crocodillo Meat. Cooked will take lesser time to eat and more nutricious.

**Fossil Fuel Bucket**

Obtain by filing up a bucket with fossil fuel. It's a better source of fuel than lava bucket since it can smelt/cook longer.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Vascular Bundle**  
This is a very rare item that drops when you break a weed. You can put items inside to store them and bring around with you!
</details>

## Plants
**Weed**

Not that weed! Is this weed! It's based on the first vascular plant ever on Earth, the Cooksonia. You can bonemeal a planted Weed Sapling(Weed Seeds) to grow Weed (can't grow naturally). Breaking this will give you more Weed Seeds.

## Blocks/Liquid
**Server**

This is a block that gives villager a job. It can also cook a whole stack of food in **ONE CLICK** with a bucket of Fossil Fuel. It also emits light.

**Fossil Oil**

Generates underground in desert and badland biomes in a form of pool. It's a good source of fuel. Falling into it will cause drowning. You can barely move in it and it will drag you to the bottom. You can put sponge to clear Fossil Oil if you want to escape or just simply dig your way out.

## Biomes
**Bombed Valley**
This is a very rare biome. You can barely see any form of life here. There's nothing in this biome.

## Secrect(I prefer not to click this)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**/nuke COMMAND**

**NUKE YOUR FRIEND's HOUSE WITH THIS COMMAND HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAHAA!!!!!!!!!!**

</details>



</details>



## QnA:

Q1: **Why did you make this mod?**

A1: I made it because I was bored.


Q2: **What do I do in this mod?**

A2: Explore I guess.


Q3: **How did you made this mod?**

A3: MCreator
